name: Smudger
classification_notes: Knowledge-based — site inaccessible. Retro display face associated with Phil's Fonts / Harold Lohner. Decorative, single weight.
summary: A retro display typeface from Phil's Fonts designer Harold Lohner.
description: Smudger is one of the novelty display faces associated with Harold Lohner and distributed through Phil's Fonts. Phil's Fonts operates as a Maryland-based type retailer representing several independent designers. Note: this entry is knowledge-based as the Phil's Fonts website was inaccessible at the time of cataloguing.
foundry_blurb: A decorative display typeface from Phil's Fonts, one of several novelty faces in their catalogue.
